title: Foundation: Guards, Mastery fix, Notes infra, remover MDA
plan: Remove lessons 10 (Introdução ao Pós-Flop) and 11 (Introdução ao MDA) from src/db/seed_lessons.py and renumber remaining lessons
Add guard in lesson_classifier.py classify_hand() to block all-in preflop hands from entering postflop lessons (verify/strengthen existing guard)
Add guard in lesson_classifier.py to block hands without hero postflop action from entering postflop lessons
Update all _eval_ methods to consistently return (int|None, str) tuples and ensure notes string is always populated with Portuguese explanation
Verify notes field flows through LessonMatch → bulk_link_hand_lessons → hand_lessons table (infra already exists, ensure it's wired correctly)
Remove _eval_mda method and any lesson 10/11 classifier logic from lesson_classifier.py
Add 'insufficient_data' mastery level in src/web/data.py, rendering as 'Poucos Dados'
Update lesson ID references throughout classifier (postflop lessons shift down by 2 after removal)
Update tests/test_lesson_classifier.py: remove lesson 10/11 tests, renumber, add guard tests, add mastery test, add notes test
